scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --outfile=dist/invoice.cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod +x dist/invoice.cjs && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp assets/fonts/*.ttf dist/fonts/
scripts.build:bin: npm run build && pkg package.json --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/invoice --fallback-to-source
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/invoice.cjs validate invoices/20260006.yaml && node dist/invoice.cjs render invoices/20260006.yaml --output out/Faktura_20260006.generated.pdf
